notes: This sample identifies rendered-surface risks and module gaps only.
It is not a full replacement for Phase8C 630-payload desktop and mobile QA.

content_asset_chain.responsibility: Lock source ids, a9fd baseline hash, runtime registry hash, launch scope, and negative production guarantees.
Hold 1R-A through 1R-H content assets, source mapping reports, safety reports, runner eval reports, and rollback plans.
Export candidate payloads, import inactive release, run staging/rendered QA evidence, and prepare manual production gate.
Compose sanitized Enneagram result projection and report API response consumed by fap-web.
Fetch report/report-access and normalize backend Enneagram V2 pages, modules, type rows, and access-gated modules.
Dispatch ENNEAGRAM report payload to the dedicated Enneagram result shell and render page/module sections.
Keep public share and PDF/print surfaces public-safe and private-result-safe.
Validate candidate rendered QA over 630 payloads on desktop and mobile without import or activation.

rendered_pages.product_purpose: Explain how to read the current result, top candidates, confidence boundary, all-nine profile, and method limits.

observed_issues: close_call headline uses '你可能在 ... 之间摇摆'; future copy should prefer '当前结果更接近 ... 的接近型结构' wording.
top candidate chips can render display_score when present; public copy should prefer rank/relative tendency over raw display score.
modules.thickening_need: Add module-level copy variants for clear, close_call, diffuse, and low_quality states with no final-type certainty.

observed_issues: English type labels are primary in the observed zh-CN result.
display_score can be rendered directly.
modules.thickening_need: Chinese-first type naming, motive contrast, and safe user-facing explanation for Top1/Top2/Top3 without score certainty.

observed_issues: Good primary deep-dive structure is present, but should be checked for repeated generic copy across all nine types.
modules.thickening_need: Strengthen all nine type variants with distinct motivation, stress, relationship, and self-misread language.

observed_issues: Observed zh-CN result displayed raw-like values such as 10000, 9270, 9554, and 9028.
Bar widths clamp to 100 while the numeric label still exposes the oversized value.
modules.thickening_need: Convert All 9 profile into user-readable tendency bands, ranked pattern notes, and no raw/display score exposure.

observed_issues: Confidence copy is structurally safe but still engineering-labeled in places.
modules.thickening_need: Turn confidence labels into reader-facing states: clear, close-call, diffuse, and low-quality.

observed_issues: Observed page displayed absolute gap, display percent gap, normalized gap, and profile entropy directly.
Profile entropy appeared as a raw decimal metric.
modules.thickening_need: Replace public raw metric display with explanatory confidence-band copy and keep raw values internal.

observed_issues: Observed page rendered '当前只提供 scaffold 内容。' for a 1 vs 2 close-call state.
modules.thickening_need: Use 36-pair close-call assets from batch 1R-F and validate every pair renders without scaffold fallback.

observed_issues: Observed page displayed strength 0; user-facing copy should explain adjacent hint without hard wing judgement.
modules.thickening_need: Add safe adjacent-wing explanatory copy or suppress numeric strength when not meaningful.

observed_issues: Boundary copy correctly blocks clinical, therapy, hiring, and absolute typing use.
modules.thickening_need: Keep as policy anchor; future edits must preserve no diagnosis, no hiring, no direct E105/FC144 score comparison.

rendered_pages.product_purpose: Translate motivation pattern into work style, collaboration strengths, friction points, leadership, being managed, and triggers.

observed_issues: Observed copy is readable and domain-relevant.
modules.thickening_need: Ensure all nine type variants distinguish work mechanism, best environment, and energy drain.

observed_issues: No scaffold hit observed in sampled viewport.
modules.thickening_need: Add concrete collaboration examples by type without implying hiring suitability.

observed_issues: No scaffold hit observed in sampled viewport.
modules.thickening_need: Separate friction, repair language, and environment fit from employment-screening claims.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in the Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Audit for type-specific leadership language and no performance-prediction claims.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in the Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Make the module practical but not employer-screening oriented.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in the Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Connect triggers to self-observation and repair actions, not pathology.

rendered_pages.product_purpose: Explain healthy expression, cost expression, stress triggers, recovery actions, and state spectrum.

observed_issues: Prior PDF/render review suggested repeated generic growth copy may exist; this PR records it as a batch QA requirement, not a full-current-630 conclusion.
modules.thickening_need: Make growth axis type-specific and scenario-specific.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Distinguish strength expression from type praise or fixed identity.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Explain tradeoffs without diagnosis or shame framing.

observed_issues: Not fully audited in Chrome sample.
modules.thickening_need: Add observable early signals and keep clinical/treatment language blocked.

observed_issues: Prior PDF/render review suggested repeated '30-day experiment' style copy may need deduplication.
modules.thickening_need: Provide concrete low-risk experiments by type and state.

observed_issues: Needs full rendered distinctiveness pass.
modules.thickening_need: Differentiate stable, average, and strained state copy per type.

rendered_pages.product_purpose: Explain relationship needs, strengths, misread patterns, conflict scripts, and communication manual.

observed_issues: Visible page section exists.
modules.thickening_need: Make relationship need copy public-safe and share-aware.

observed_issues: Visible page section exists.
modules.thickening_need: Avoid fixed relationship-role claims.

observed_issues: Visible page section exists.
modules.thickening_need: Add self/other framing without publishing private result text.

observed_issues: Visible page section exists.
modules.thickening_need: Strengthen conflict repair scripts without therapy or treatment claims.

observed_issues: Visible page section exists.
modules.thickening_need: Prepare share-safe excerpts and private-only detailed copy boundaries.

rendered_pages.product_purpose: Preserve method boundaries, 7-day observation, technical note, FC144 follow-up, PDF/share/retake actions.

observed_issues: Good safety boundary visible.
modules.thickening_need: Keep concise; do not bury it under long method text.

observed_issues: Observed page has a clear 7-day observation CTA.
modules.thickening_need: Tie observation prompts to close-call and growth modules by type.

observed_issues: Observed page uses FC144 as next step; boundary must stay second-lens only.
modules.thickening_need: Add safe follow-up copy that does not call FC144 more accurate or replacement.

observed_issues: Visible Technical Note entry exists.
modules.thickening_need: Keep as method explanation, not public authority claim.

modules.renderer: Enneagram actions card and share surface
observed_issues: Observed result page had PDF unavailable for safety.
Observed result page did not show an obvious share result button in the inspected tail section.
modules.thickening_need: Define public-safe share summary entry and keep PDF private-link safety boundary before re-enabling.

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only sample rendered '当前只提供 scaffold 内容。' for close-call pair 1 vs 2.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: The result page is meant to be a complete motivation-pattern explanation surface; scaffold copy breaks trust and blocks content-thickening rollout.
issue_ledger.recommended_next_pr: Enneagram result page close-call rendered asset consumption hardening

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only sample rendered All 9 values including 10000, 9270, 9554, 9028.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: Oversized internal/display scores are not user-readable and can invite false precision or fixed-type interpretation.
issue_ledger.recommended_owner: fap-web renderer policy with backend display contract
issue_ledger.recommended_next_pr: Enneagram result page user-readable score band display policy

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only sample rendered absolute gap, display percent gap, normalized gap, and profile entropy.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: Raw metric vocabulary is useful internally but weak as public result-page copy; it should become confidence-band explanation.
issue_ledger.recommended_owner: fap-web renderer policy with backend display contract

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only zh-CN sample displayed English type names such as The Reformer, The Helper, and The Achiever as primary labels.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: Chinese users should get Chinese-first type names with English aliases as secondary context.
issue_ledger.recommended_owner: fap-api projection/content assets plus fap-web fallback labels
issue_ledger.recommended_next_pr: Enneagram zh-CN type naming and alias contract

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only close-call sample used '你可能在 The Reformer 与 2 之间摇摆'. This is safer than '你就是', but still should be softened for the final product line.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: Enneagram must remain a reflection tool and avoid fixed-type certainty framing.
issue_ledger.recommended_next_pr: Enneagram result shell close-call certainty copy hardening

issue_ledger.evidence: Chrome read-only tail section showed PDF unavailable and retake, but no obvious share result CTA in the inspected area.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: The strategic goal includes a high-propagation public-safe summary; share should be present only when public-safe contract passes.
issue_ledger.recommended_owner: fap-web share surface with backend public-summary contract
issue_ledger.recommended_next_pr: Enneagram result page public-safe share CTA handoff

issue_ledger.evidence: Prior rendered/PDF inspection suggested repeated generic growth and experiment copy; this PR records it as a required full-batch QA check, not as a verified current 630-payload failure.
issue_ledger.why_it_matters: Content thickness depends on type/module distinctiveness, not only presence of text.

module_batch_plan.title: Overview and Top 3 candidate reading
module_batch_plan.goal: Make the first page Chinese-first, no-certainty, and motive-oriented.

module_batch_plan.title: All 9 profile and score-band translation
module_batch_plan.goal: Replace raw score and raw metric display with user-readable tendency bands and confidence explanation.

module_batch_plan.title: Close-call pair differentiation
module_batch_plan.goal: Consume close-call pair assets without scaffold fallback and explain pair distinctions as hypotheses.

module_batch_plan.title: Work reality
module_batch_plan.goal: Make work copy practical while blocking hiring, salary, performance, and employment suitability claims.

module_batch_plan.title: Growth spectrum
module_batch_plan.goal: Deepen growth and stress copy with type-specific observation and recovery actions.

module_batch_plan.title: Relationship and conflict
module_batch_plan.goal: Build relationship reflection and conflict repair copy with private/public boundaries.

module_batch_plan.title: Method, observation, share, and PDF/public boundary
module_batch_plan.goal: Keep method boundaries visible while enabling public-safe share and controlled follow-up paths.
